<a id="sec-7-7-8-2-fields"></a>
## 7.7.8.2 Flit Error Log 1 Register - Field Definitions | 7.7.8.2 Flit 错误日志 1 寄存器 — 字段定义


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

| Encoding | Link Width |
|---|---|
| 000b | x1 |
| 001b | x2 |
| 010b | x4 |
| 011b | x8 |
| 100b | x16 |
| Others | Reserved |

**Table 7-92 Flit Error Log 1 Register**

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | **Flit Error Log Valid** – This bit is Set to 1b when an error is logged in this register.<br><br>Writing 1b to this bit either clears this bit or, if More Entries for Flit Error Log Register are Valid (i.e., Bit 13) is Set, loads the Flit Error Log 1 Register and Flit Error Log 2 Register with the next oldest log entry<br><br>Default Zero. | RW1CS |
| 3:1 | **Flit Error Link Width** – Link Width when error was logged (taking into account any narrowing due to L0p). Encoding is:<br>x1 / x2 / x4 / x8 / x16 / Reserved<br><br>Default is Zero. | ROS |
| 7:4 | **Flit Offset from the Last Logged Flit in Error** – This is the offset from the last Flit whose error has been recorded in the prior entry of the Flit Error Log Register, if any.<br><br>- If this is the very first error that gets logged or this is the only copy of the Flit Error Log Register, this value must be 0h.<br>- If the previous flit was in error and logged, this value must be 1h.<br>- If the last logged Flit was more than 15 Flits away, this value must be Fh.<br><br>This field only reflects errors that were logged. If the previous flit was in error but was not logged, that error has no effect on this value.<br><br>Default is Zero. | ROS |
| 12:8 | **Consecutive Flit Error after the Last Flit Error** – Initially, this field is Zero. If there are any errors (either correctable or uncorrectable by FEC) in any of the 5 consecutive Flits immediately following the Flit recorded in this log entry, the corresponding bits are set to 1b; otherwise they remain 0b. This field can change value after Flit Error Log Valid is Set and more Flits are received. If More Entries for Flit Error Log Register is Set, some bits of this field may not be meaningful and the actual value of this field needs to be computed from this field and from subsequent log entries.<br><br>Consider consecutive log entries A, B and C, where A is older than B and B is older than C:<br><br>- If Flit Offset from the Last Logged Flit in Error in B is >5, then this field in log entry A is accurate (since there were more than 5 intervening flits between A and B).<br>- If Flit Offset from the Last Logged Flit in Error in B is ≤ 5, then some bits of this field in A must be computed from B (and C, if applicable, depending on the distance between A and C).<br>- If Flit Offset from the Last Logged Flit in Error in B = 2h, then entry A is for two flits earlier. For entry A:<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;◦ Bit 0 represents the intervening Flit (which might have been in error but not logged) and<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;◦ Bits 4:1 are not meaningful and must be computed from B (and C, if applicable, depending on the distance between A and C). Computed bit 1 is 1b (because B exists), and computed bits 4:2 are bits 2:0 of B. | ROS |

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

| 编码 | 链路宽度 |
|---|---|
| 000b | x1 |
| 001b | x2 |
| 010b | x4 |
| 011b | x8 |
| 100b | x16 |
| 其他 | 保留 |

**表 7-92 Flit 错误日志 1 寄存器**

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | **Flit Error Log Valid(Flit 错误日志有效)** – 当错误被记录到该寄存器时,该位置为 1b。<br><br>向该位写入 1b 要么清除该位,要么(若 More Entries for Flit Error Log Register are Valid,即第 13 位 置位)将 Flit 错误日志 1 寄存器和 Flit 错误日志 2 寄存器加载为下一个最旧的日志条目。<br><br>默认为零。 | RW1CS |
| 3:1 | **Flit Error Link Width(Flit 错误链路宽度)** – 记录错误时的链路宽度(考虑因 L0p 引起的任何收窄)。编码为:<br>x1 / x2 / x4 / x8 / x16 / 保留<br><br>默认为零。 | ROS |
| 7:4 | **Flit Offset from the Last Logged Flit in Error(距上次记录错误 Flit 的偏移量)** – 这是距 Flit 错误日志寄存器前一个条目中(若有)所记录错误 Flit 的偏移量。<br><br>- 若这是记录的第一个错误,或这是 Flit 错误日志寄存器的唯一副本,则该值必须为 0h。<br>- 若前一个 Flit 出错并已被记录,则该值必须为 1h。<br>- 若最近一次记录的 Flit 距离超过 15 个 Flit,则该值必须为 Fh。<br><br>该字段仅反映已被记录的错误。若前一个 Flit 出错但未被记录,则该错误对该值没有影响。<br><br>默认为零。 | ROS |
| 12:8 | **Consecutive Flit Error after the Last Flit Error(上次 Flit 错误之后的连续 Flit 错误)** – 初始时,该字段为零。若紧接本日志条目所记录 Flit 之后的 5 个连续 Flit 中存在任意错误(FEC 可纠正或不可纠正),则对应位被置为 1b;否则保持为 0b。该字段的值在 Flit Error Log Valid 置位且接收到更多 Flit 后可能会变化。若 More Entries for Flit Error Log Register 置位,则该字段的某些位可能没有意义,该字段的实际值需要根据本字段以及后续日志条目计算得出。<br><br>考虑连续的日志条目 A、B 和 C,其中 A 早于 B,B 早于 C:<br><br>- 若 B 中 Flit Offset from the Last Logged Flit in Error >5,则 A 条目中的该字段是准确的(因为 A 和 B 之间有多于 5 个 Flit)。<br>- 若 B 中 Flit Offset from the Last Logged Flit in Error ≤ 5,则 A 中该字段的某些位必须由 B(以及 C,若适用,取决于 A 与 C 之间的距离)计算得到。<br>- 若 B 中 Flit Offset from the Last Logged Flit in Error = 2h,则 A 条目对应早两个 Flit 的位置。对于 A 条目:<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;◦ 第 0 位表示中间的 Flit(其可能出错但未被记录);以及<br>&nbsp;&nbsp;◦ 第 4:1 位没有意义,必须由 B(以及 C,若适用,取决于 A 与 C 之间的距离)计算得到。计算得到的第 1 位为 1b(因为存在 B),计算得到的第 4:2 位为 B 的第 2:0 位。 | ROS |

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-7-7-8-2-fields-cont"></a>
## 7.7.8.2 Flit Error Log 1 Register - Field Definitions (continued) | 7.7.8.2 Flit 错误日志 1 寄存器 — 字段定义(续)

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- If in turn, Flit Offset from the Last Logged Flit in Error in C is ≤5, some of the bits in B are not meaningful and must be computed from C (and possibly the next entry D, if applicable and available).

Default is Zero.

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|---|---|---|
| 13 | **More Entries for Flit Error Log Register are Valid** – when Set, it indicates that the Port has additional valid copies of the Flit Error Log Register for subsequent Flits. A port that implements only one set of Flit Error Log Register is permitted to hardwire this to Zero.<br><br>If this bit is Set, clearing the Flit Error Log Valid bit loads the next oldest Flit Error Log Register entry. This bit can change value when Flit Error Log Valid bit is Set and an additional error is being logged.<br><br>Default is Zero. | ROS |
| 14 | **Unrecognized Flit** – when Set indicates receipt of a Flit that passes CRC after FEC decode but uses a Reserved encoding in the Flit Usage or Flit Status fields.<br><br>Default is Zero | ROS |
| 15 | **FEC Uncorrectable Error in Flit** – When set to 1b indicates either a CRC mismatch or one of the three FEC groups detecting an error it could not correct | ROS |
| 23:16 | **Syndrome Parity for ECC Group 0** – Synd_Parity in § Chapter 4.<br><br>Default is Zero. | ROS |
| 31:24 | **Syndrome Check for ECC Group 0** – Synd_Check in § Chapter 4.<br><br>Default is Zero. | ROS |

The Flit Error Log 1 Register and Flit Error Log 2 Register are Link level registers and contain information about the Flit errors corrected and/or detected by the FEC and/or CRC in a received Flit.

| Bits | Field |
|---|---|
| 7:0 | Syndrome Parity for ECC Group 1 |
| 15:8 | Syndrome Check for ECC Group 1 |
| 23:16 | Syndrome Parity for ECC Group 2 |
| 31:24 | Syndrome Check for ECC Group 2 |

**Figure 7-106 Flit Error Log 2 Register**

**Table 7-93 Flit Error Log 2 Register**

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|---|---|---|
| 7:0 | **Syndrome Parity for ECC Group 1** – Synd_Parity in § Chapter 4.<br><br>Default is Zero. | ROS |

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 反过来,若 C 中 Flit Offset from the Last Logged Flit in Error ≤5,则 B 中的某些位没有意义,必须由 C(以及可能的下一个条目 D,若适用且可用)计算得到。

默认为零。

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|---|---|---|
| 13 | **More Entries for Flit Error Log Register are Valid(Flit 错误日志寄存器存在更多有效条目)** – 置位时,指示该端口针对后续 Flit 拥有额外的有效 Flit 错误日志寄存器副本。仅实现一组 Flit 错误日志寄存器的端口允许将该位硬连线为零。<br><br>若该位置位,则清除 Flit Error Log Valid 位会加载下一个最旧的 Flit 错误日志寄存器条目。当 Flit Error Log Valid 位置位且正在记录另一个错误时,该位的值可能会变化。<br><br>默认为零。 | ROS |
| 14 | **Unrecognized Flit(无法识别的 Flit)** – 置位时指示接收到一个 Flit,该 Flit 在 FEC 解码后通过了 CRC,但其 Flit Usage 或 Flit Status 字段使用了保留编码。<br><br>默认为零。 | ROS |
| 15 | **FEC Uncorrectable Error in Flit(Flit 中的 FEC 不可纠正错误)** – 置为 1b 时,指示出现 CRC 失配,或三个 FEC 组之一检测到无法纠正的错误 | ROS |
| 23:16 | **Syndrome Parity for ECC Group 0(ECC 组 0 的校验子奇偶校验)** – 第 4 章中的 Synd_Parity。<br><br>默认为零。 | ROS |
| 31:24 | **Syndrome Check for ECC Group 0(ECC 组 0 的校验子校验)** – 第 4 章中的 Synd_Check。<br><br>默认为零。 | ROS |

Flit 错误日志 1 寄存器和 Flit 错误日志 2 寄存器是链路级寄存器,包含接收 Flit 中由 FEC 和/或 CRC 纠正和/或检测到的 Flit 错误的相关信息。

| 位 | 字段 |
|---|---|
| 7:0 | Syndrome Parity for ECC Group 1 |
| 15:8 | Syndrome Check for ECC Group 1 |
| 23:16 | Syndrome Parity for ECC Group 2 |
| 31:24 | Syndrome Check for ECC Group 2 |

**图 7-106 Flit 错误日志 2 寄存器**

> <img src="figures/chapter_07/fig_1141_1_tight.png" width="700">


**表 7-93 Flit 错误日志 2 寄存器**

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|---|---|---|
| 7:0 | **Syndrome Parity for ECC Group 1(ECC 组 1 的校验子奇偶校验)** – 第 4 章中的 Synd_Parity。<br><br>默认为零。 | ROS |

</td>
</tr>

<a id="sec-7-7-8-4"></a>
## 7.7.8.4 Flit Error Counter Control Register (Offset 0Ch) | Flit 错误计数控制寄存器（偏移 0Ch）


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The Flit Error Counter registers are Link wide and count the number of Flit and/or Ordered Set errors occurring on a Link operating in Flit mode (Flit 模式).

**Figure 7-107 Flit Error Counter Control Register**

- Bit 0: Flit Error Counter Enable
- Bit 1: Flit Error Counter Interrupt Enable
- Bits 3:2: Events to count
- Bits 11:4: Trigger Event on Error Count
- Bits 15:12: RsvdP

**Table 7-94 Flit Error Counter Control Register**

**Bit Location** | **Register Description** | **Attributes**

- **0** — Flit Error Counter Enable – Setting this bit enables and starts the Flit Error Counter in the Link. Clearing this bit stops the Flit Error Counter. Default is Zero. — RW
- **1** — Flit Error Counter Interrupt Enable – Send an interrupt when Interrupt Generated based on Trigger Event Count transitions from 0b to 1b. The interrupt vector is Interrupt Message Number (see § Section 7.5.3.2). Default is Zero. — RW
- **3:2** — Events to count – FEC-correctable Flit (see § Section 4.2.3.4.2), Invalid Flit (see § Section 4.2.3.4.2), or Framing Error (see § Section 4.2.2.3.4 and § Section 4.2.3.2).
  - 00b: FEC-correctable Flit
  - 01b: Invalid Flit
  - 10b: All events in 00b plus:
    - a 1b/1b TS Ordered Set on any Lane with only one valid half (see § Section 4.2.5.1)
    - an invalid Ordered Set on any Lane
  - 11b: (see continuation on next page)
  - Default is Zero. — RW

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

Flit 错误计数寄存器是链路级（Link wide）寄存器，用于统计工作在 Flit 模式（Flit Mode）下的链路上发生的 Flit 和/或有序集（Ordered Set）错误数量。

**图 7-107 Flit 错误计数控制寄存器**

> <img src="figures/chapter_07/fig_1142_1_tight.png" width="700">


- 位 0：Flit 错误计数器使能（Flit Error Counter Enable）
- 位 1：Flit 错误计数器中断使能（Flit Error Counter Interrupt Enable）
- 位 3:2：统计事件（Events to count）
- 位 11:4：按错误计数触发的触发事件（Trigger Event on Error Count）
- 位 15:12：RsvdP

**表 7-94 Flit 错误计数控制寄存器**

**位位置** | **寄存器说明** | **属性**

- **0** — Flit 错误计数器使能（Flit Error Counter Enable）— 置 1 启用并启动链路中的 Flit 错误计数器。清零则停止 Flit 错误计数器。默认值为零。— RW
- **1** — Flit 错误计数器中断使能（Flit Error Counter Interrupt Enable）— 当基于触发事件计数的"已生成中断"从 0b 跳变为 1b 时发送中断。中断向量为中断消息号（Interrupt Message Number），参见 § Section 7.5.3.2。默认值为零。— RW
- **3:2** — 统计事件（Events to count）— FEC 可纠正 Flit（FEC-correctable Flit，参见 § Section 4.2.3.4.2）、无效 Flit（Invalid Flit，参见 § Section 4.2.3.4.2）或成帧错误（Framing Error，参见 § Section 4.2.2.3.4 和 § Section 4.2.3.2）。
  - 00b：FEC 可纠正 Flit
  - 01b：无效 Flit
  - 10b：00b 中所有事件，外加：
    - 任意通道（Lane）上仅一个有效半部的 1b/1b TS 有序集（参见 § Section 4.2.5.1）
    - 任意通道上的无效有序集
  - 11b：（参见下页续表）
  - 默认值为零。— RW

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


---

<!-- 📄 Page 1143 -->
---

<a id="sec-7-7-8-4-cont"></a>
## 7.7.8.4 Flit Error Counter Control Register (Offset 0Ch) — Continued | Flit 错误计数控制寄存器（偏移 0Ch）— 续

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**Table 7-94 Flit Error Counter Control Register (continued)**

**Bit Location** | **Register Description** | **Attributes**

- **3:2** (cont.) — Events to count – continued
  - 000b: FEC-correctable Flit
  - 001b: Invalid Flit
  - 010b: All events in 00b plus events described on prior page
  - 011b: All events in 00b plus events described on prior page
  - 100b: All events in 00b plus events described on prior page
  - Others: Reserved
  - Default is Zero. — RW
- **11:4** — Trigger Event on Error Count – Generate an event (interrupt, if enabled) if this field is non-zero and the Flit Error Counter field in Flit Error Counter Status Register exceeds this value. Default is Zero. — RW

**Figure 7-108 Flit Error Counter Status Register**

- Bits 2:0: Link Width when Error Counter Started
- Bit 3: Interrupt Generated based on Trigger Event Count
- Bits 7:4: RsvdZ
- Bits 15:8: Flit Error Counter

**Table 7-95 Flit Error Counter Status Register**

**Bit Location** | **Register Description** | **Attributes**

- **2:0** — Link Width when Error Counter Started – This field tracks the link width when the error counter started or restarted counting. The encodings are as follows:
  - 000b: x1
  - 001b: x2
  - 010b: x4
  - 011b: x8
  - 100b: x16
  - Others: Reserved
  - Default is Zero. — ROS
- **3** — Interrupt Generated based on Trigger Event Count – hardware Sets this bit when an interrupt is generated based on the trigger event. While this bit is Set, no new interrupts will be generated based on the trigger event. Cleared on 0b to 1b transition of Flit Error Counter Enable. Default is Zero. — RW1CS
- **15:8** — Flit Error Counter – Increments by 1 when enabled and a countable event has occurred, as defined in the Flit Error Counter Control Register. Decrements by 1 at a fixed rate, if non-zero, based on Encoding and Link Width as follows (see continuation on next page). — ROS

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**表 7-94 Flit 错误计数控制寄存器（续）**

**位位置** | **寄存器说明** | **属性**

- **3:2**（续）— 统计事件（Events to count）— 续
  - 000b：FEC 可纠正 Flit
  - 001b：无效 Flit
  - 010b：00b 中所有事件，外加上页所述事件
  - 011b：00b 中所有事件，外加上页所述事件
  - 100b：00b 中所有事件，外加上页所述事件
  - 其他：保留
  - 默认值为零。— RW
- **11:4** — 按错误计数触发的触发事件（Trigger Event on Error Count）— 若该字段非零，且 Flit 错误计数状态寄存器中的 Flit Error Counter 字段超过此值，则生成一个事件（若已使能则为中断）。默认值为零。— RW

**图 7-108 Flit 错误计数状态寄存器**

> <img src="figures/chapter_07/fig_1143_1_tight.png" width="700">


- 位 2:0：错误计数器启动时的链路宽度（Link Width when Error Counter Started）
- 位 3：基于触发事件计数已生成中断（Interrupt Generated based on Trigger Event Count）
- 位 7:4：RsvdZ
- 位 15:8：Flit 错误计数器（Flit Error Counter）

**表 7-95 Flit 错误计数状态寄存器**

**位位置** | **寄存器说明** | **属性**

- **2:0** — 错误计数器启动时的链路宽度（Link Width when Error Counter Started）— 该字段记录错误计数器启动或重新启动计数时的链路宽度。编码如下：
  - 000b：x1
  - 001b：x2
  - 010b：x4
  - 011b：x8
  - 100b：x16
  - 其他：保留
  - 默认值为零。— ROS
- **3** — 基于触发事件计数已生成中断（Interrupt Generated based on Trigger Event Count）— 当基于触发事件生成中断时，硬件将该位置 1。只要该位被置位，就不会再基于触发事件生成新的中断。在 Flit Error Counter Enable 由 0b 跳变为 1b 时清除。默认值为零。— RW1CS
- **15:8** — Flit 错误计数器（Flit Error Counter）— 使能且发生 Flit 错误计数控制寄存器中定义的、可计数的事件时加 1。若非零，则按以下与编码和链路宽度相关的固定速率减 1（详见下页）。— ROS

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

<!-- 📄 Page 1144 -->
---

<a id="sec-7-7-8-5"></a>
## 7.7.8.5 Flit Error Counter Status Register (Offset 0Eh) | Flit 错误计数状态寄存器（偏移 0Eh）


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**Table 7-95 Flit Error Counter Status Register (continued)**

**Bit Location** | **Register Description** | **Attributes**

- **15:8** (cont.) — Flit Error Counter – Decrements at a fixed rate based on Encoding and Link Width as follows:
  - 1b/1b encoding: (Link Width × 2) UI (±5 ns), i.e., 106
  - 8b/10b encoding: 10/12 × Link Width UI (±5 ns)
  - 128b/130b encoding: 10/12 × Link Width UI (±5 ns)
  - 00b: 1b/1b
  - 01b: 8b/10b
  - 10b: 128b/130b
  - 11b: Reserved
  - Cleared on 0b to 1b transition of Flit Error Counter Enable.
  - Does not roll over.
  - Default is Zero.

The FBER Measurement Control register enables direct FBER measurement with status reported in the FBER Measurement Status Registers. For Retimers, the control is provided through Margin Command in the Control SKP Ordered Set from the Downstream Port (see § Chapter 4).

**Figure 7-109 FBER Measurement Control Register**

- Bit 0: FBER Measurement Enable
- Bit 1: Clear FBER Counters
- Bits 3:2: Granularity of per-Lane Error reported
- Bit 4: Report Longest Burst vs First Burst
- Bits 31:5: RsvdP

**Table 7-96 FBER Measurement Control Register**

**Bit Location** | **Register Description** | **Attributes**

- **0** — FBER Measurement Enable – Setting this bit enables and starts the FBER measurement in the Link. Clearing this bit stops FBER measurement. Default is Zero. — RW
- **1** — Clear FBER Counters – Writing a 1b to this bit clears the FBER counters. This bit always returns Zero when read. — RW
- **3:2** — Granularity of per-Lane Error reported –
  - 00b: count all bit errors corrected by FEC in valid Flits
  - 01b: count all even bit errors in each UI corrected by FEC in valid Flits
  - 10b: count all odd bit errors in each UI corrected by FEC in valid Flits
  - 11b: count only mismatches in the Control SKP OS as a single correctable bit error
  - FBER measurement results are undefined if this field contains 01b or 10b and the Link is not operating in PAM4 (PAM4, 四电平脉冲幅度调制).
  - Default is Zero. — RW

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**表 7-95 Flit 错误计数状态寄存器（续）**

**位位置** | **寄存器说明** | **属性**

- **15:8**（续）— Flit 错误计数器（Flit Error Counter）— 按以下与编码和链路宽度相关的固定速率减 1：
  - 1b/1b 编码：(链路宽度 × 2) UI（±5 ns），即 106
  - 8b/10b 编码：10/12 × 链路宽度 UI（±5 ns）
  - 128b/130b 编码：10/12 × 链路宽度 UI（±5 ns）
  - 00b：1b/1b
  - 01b：8b/10b
  - 10b：128b/130b
  - 11b：保留
  - 在 Flit Error Counter Enable 由 0b 跳变为 1b 时清除。
  - 不会回绕。
  - 默认值为零。

FBER 测量控制寄存器使能直接的 FBER（Flit Bit Error Rate，Flit 误码率）测量，结果在 FBER 测量状态寄存器中报告。对于 Retimer，通过下游端口（Downstream Port）在 Control SKP 有序集中下发的 Margin Command 提供控制（参见 § Chapter 4）。

**图 7-109 FBER 测量控制寄存器**

> <img src="figures/chapter_07/fig_1144_1_tight.png" width="700">


- 位 0：FBER 测量使能（FBER Measurement Enable）
- 位 1：清除 FBER 计数器（Clear FBER Counters）
- 位 3:2：上报的逐通道错误粒度（Granularity of per-Lane Error reported）
- 位 4：上报最长突发还是首次突发（Report Longest Burst vs First Burst）
- 位 31:5：RsvdP

**表 7-96 FBER 测量控制寄存器**

**位位置** | **寄存器说明** | **属性**

- **0** — FBER 测量使能（FBER Measurement Enable）— 置 1 启用并启动链路中的 FBER 测量。清零则停止 FBER 测量。默认值为零。— RW
- **1** — 清除 FBER 计数器（Clear FBER Counters）— 向该位写 1b 清除 FBER 计数器。该位读取时始终返回零。— RW
- **3:2** — 上报的逐通道错误粒度（Granularity of per-Lane Error reported）—
  - 00b：统计有效 Flit 中所有由 FEC 纠正的比特错误
  - 01b：统计有效 Flit 中每个 UI 内由 FEC 纠正的所有偶数比特错误
  - 10b：统计有效 Flit 中每个 UI 内由 FEC 纠正的所有奇数比特错误
  - 11b：仅将 Control SKP OS 中的失配计为单个可纠正比特错误
  - 若该字段为 01b 或 10b，且链路未工作在 PAM4（四电平脉冲幅度调制）模式，则 FBER 测量结果未定义。
  - 默认值为零。— RW

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


---

<!-- 📄 Page 1145 -->
---

<a id="sec-7-7-8-6"></a>
## 7.7.8.6 FBER Measurement Control Register (Offset 10h) | FBER 测量控制寄存器（偏移 10h）

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**Table 7-96 FBER Measurement Control Register (continued)**

**Bit Location** | **Register Description** | **Attributes**

- **4** — Report Longest Burst vs First Burst – This bit is now deprecated. Behavior is undefined if this bit is Set. Default is Zero. — RW

FBER Measurement Status 1 Register through FBER Measurement Status 10 Register contain a collection of per-Link and per-Lane counters:

- Flit Counter – per-Link
- Invalid Flit Counter – per-Link
- Correctable Error Counters – per-Lane (Adding these together produces a per-Link counter)

A write of 1b to either the Clear FBER Counters or the FBER Measurement Enable bit of the FBER Measurement Control Register resets the value of all of these counters to their default values. All of these counters saturate (i.e., when they reach their maximum value, they do not roll over).

**Figure 7-110 FBER Measurement Status 1 Register**

- Bits 31:0: Flit Counter

**Table 7-97 FBER Measurement Status 1 Register**

**Bit Location** | **Register Description** | **Attributes**

- **31:0** — Flit Counter – meaningful when FBER Measurement Enable is Set. Increments by 1 for every Flit received. Default is Zero. — ROS

**Figure 7-111 FBER Measurement Status 2 Register**

- Bits 15:0: Invalid Flit Counter
- Bits 31:16: RsvdZ

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**表 7-96 FBER 测量控制寄存器（续）**

**位位置** | **寄存器说明** | **属性**

- **4** — 上报最长突发还是首次突发（Report Longest Burst vs First Burst）— 该位已弃用。若被置 1，则行为未定义。默认值为零。— RW

FBER 测量状态 1 寄存器至 FBER 测量状态 10 寄存器包含一组逐链路和逐通道的计数器：

- Flit 计数器（Flit Counter）— 逐链路
- 无效 Flit 计数器（Invalid Flit Counter）— 逐链路
- 可纠正错误计数器（Correctable Error Counters）— 逐通道（将其相加可得到逐链路的计数器）

对 FBER 测量控制寄存器中的 Clear FBER Counters 位或 FBER Measurement Enable 位写 1b，会将所有这些计数器重置为其默认值。所有这些计数器均饱和（saturate，即达到最大值时不会回绕）。

**图 7-110 FBER 测量状态 1 寄存器**

> <img src="figures/chapter_07/fig_1145_1_tight.png" width="700">


- 位 31:0：Flit 计数器（Flit Counter）

**表 7-97 FBER 测量状态 1 寄存器**

**位位置** | **寄存器说明** | **属性**

- **31:0** — Flit 计数器（Flit Counter）— 仅当 FBER Measurement Enable 被置 1 时有效。每收到一个 Flit 加 1。默认值为零。— ROS

**图 7-111 FBER 测量状态 2 寄存器**

> <img src="figures/chapter_07/fig_1145_2_tight.png" width="700">


- 位 15:0：无效 Flit 计数器（Invalid Flit Counter）
- 位 31:16：RsvdZ

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

---

<a id="sec-7-7-8-8"></a>
## 7.7.8.8 FBER Measurement Status 2 Register (Offset 18h) | FBER 测量状态 2 寄存器（偏移 18h）


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

**Table 7-98 FBER Measurement Status 2 Register**

**Bit Location** | **Register Description** | **Attributes**

- **15:0** — Invalid Flit Counter – when FBER Measurement Enable is Set: Increments by 1 for every invalid Flit received. Otherwise, behavior is undefined. Default is 0000h. — ROS

**Figure 7-112 FBER Measurement Status 3 Register**

- Bits 15:0: Lane #0 Correctable Counter
- Bits 31:16: Lane #1 Correctable Counter

**Table 7-99 FBER Measurement Status 3 Register**

**Bit Location** | **Register Description** | **Attributes**

- **15:0** — Lane #0 Correctable Counter – counts Per-Lane Correctable Bit Errors or SKP Parity Mismatches. If FBER Measurement Enable is Set: this 16-bit counter counts the number of FEC-correctable bit errors per Flit (up to 24) or the number of SKP OS Parity mismatch in a Port, as per the value in Granularity of per-Lane Error Reported bit in the FBER Measurement Control Register. This counter does not roll-over. Default is Zero. — RO
- **31:16** — Lane #1 Correctable Counter – Behavior is identical to Lane #0 Correctable Counter. — RO

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

**表 7-98 FBER 测量状态 2 寄存器**

**位位置** | **寄存器说明** | **属性**

- **15:0** — 无效 Flit 计数器（Invalid Flit Counter）— 当 FBER Measurement Enable 被置 1 时：每收到一个无效 Flit 加 1。否则行为未定义。默认值为 0000h。— ROS

**图 7-112 FBER 测量状态 3 寄存器**

- 位 15:0：通道 #0 可纠正计数器（Lane #0 Correctable Counter）
- 位 31:16：通道 #1 可纠正计数器（Lane #1 Correctable Counter）

**表 7-99 FBER 测量状态 3 寄存器**

**位位置** | **寄存器说明** | **属性**

- **15:0** — 通道 #0 可纠正计数器（Lane #0 Correctable Counter）— 统计逐通道可纠正比特错误或 SKP 奇偶校验失配。若 FBER Measurement Enable 被置 1：该 16 位计数器统计每个 Flit 中 FEC 可纠正比特错误数量（最多 24 个）或端口中 SKP OS 奇偶校验失配数量，具体依 FBER 测量控制寄存器中"上报的逐通道错误粒度"位的值而定。该计数器不回绕。默认值为零。— RO
- **31:16** — 通道 #1 可纠正计数器（Lane #1 Correctable Counter）— 行为与通道 #0 可纠正计数器相同。— RO

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

- **31:16** — 通道 #11 可纠正计数器（Lane #11 Correctable Counter）— 行为与通道 #0 可纠正计数器相同。— RO

<a id="sec-7-7-8-16"></a>
## 7.7.8.16 FBER Measurement Status 10 Register (Offset 38h) | FBER 测量状态 10 寄存器（偏移 38h）


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The Device 3 Extended Capability structure must be implemented in any Function or RCRB that implements any mechanism that requires the registers in this Extended Capability. It is permitted for this Extended Capability to be implemented in Functions or RCRBs that do not require any of the registers in this Extended Capability.

§ Figure 7-120 details allocation of the register bits in the Device 3 Extended Capability structure.

**Figure 7-120 Device 3 Extended Capability Structure**

- Bytes 0–3 (+000h): PCI Express Extended Capability Header
- Bytes 4–7 (+004h): Device Capabilities 3 Register
- Bytes 8–11 (+008h): Device Control 3 Register
- Bytes 12–15 (+00Ch): Device Status 3 Register

§ Figure 7-121 details allocation of the register fields in the Device 3 Extended Capability Header; § Table 7-107 provides the respective bit definitions.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

任何实现了需要本扩展能力结构（Extended Capability）中寄存器的机制的 Function 或 RCRB，都必须实现 Device 3 扩展能力结构。允许在不需要本扩展能力结构中任何寄存器的 Function 或 RCRB 中实现此扩展能力结构。

§ 图 7-120 详细说明了 Device 3 扩展能力结构中寄存器位的分配。

**图 7-120 Device 3 扩展能力结构**

> <img src="figures/chapter_07/fig_1149_1_tight.png" width="700">


- 字节 0–3（+000h）：PCI Express 扩展能力头（PCI Express Extended Capability Header）
- 字节 4–7（+004h）：Device Capabilities 3 寄存器
- 字节 8–11（+008h）：Device Control 3 寄存器
- 字节 12–15（+00Ch）：Device Status 3 寄存器

§ 图 7-121 详细说明了 Device 3 扩展能力头中寄存器字段的分配；§ 表 7-107 给出相应的位定义。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

### Figure 7-121 / Table 7-107: Device 3 Extended Capability Header | Device 3 扩展能力头


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>

<tr>
<td>

Figure 7-121 Device 3 Extended Capability Header

| Bits 0-15 | Bits 16-19 | Bits 20-31 |
|---|---|---|
| Device 3 Extended Capability ID = 002Fh | Capability Version | Next Capability Offset |

Table 7-107 Device 3 Extended Capability Header

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|---|---|---|
| 15:0 | **Device 3 Extended Capability ID** - Indicates the Device 3 Extended Capability structure. This field must return a Capability ID of 002Fh indicating that this is a Device 3 Extended Capability structure. | RO |
| 19:16 | **Capability Version** - This field is a PCI-SIG defined version number that indicates the version of the Capability structure present. Must be 1h for this version of the specification. | RO |
| 31:20 | **Next Capability Offset** - The offset to the next PCI Extended Capability structure or 000h if no other items exist in the linked list of capabilities. | RO |

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

图 7-121 Device 3 扩展能力头

| 位 0-15 | 位 16-19 | 位 20-31 |
|---|---|---|
| Device 3 扩展能力 ID = 002Fh | Capability Version (能力版本) | Next Capability Offset (下一能力偏移) |

表 7-107 Device 3 扩展能力头

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|---|---|---|
| 15:0 | **Device 3 扩展能力 ID** — 标识 Device 3 扩展能力结构。本字段必须返回能力 ID 002Fh,表示这是一个 Device 3 扩展能力结构。 | RO |
| 19:16 | **Capability Version(能力版本)** — 该字段是 PCI-SIG 定义的版本号,指示所存在的能力结构的版本。对于本版本的规范,必须为 1h。 | RO |
| 31:20 | **Next Capability Offset(下一能力偏移)** — 指向下一个 PCI 扩展能力结构的偏移,若能力链表无其他项则为 000h。 | RO |

</td>

<a id="sec-7-7-9-2-cont"></a>
### Device Capabilities 3 Register (cont.) | Device 能力 3 寄存器(续)


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Table 7-108 Device Capabilities 3 Register (continued)

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | **14-Bit Tag Completer Supported** – If this bit is Set, the Function supports 14-Bit Tag Completer capability; otherwise, the Function does not. See § Section 2.2.6.2 for additional details. This bit MUST@FLIT be Set. For VFs, this bit value must be identical to the associated PF's bit value. | HwInit |
| 2 | **14-Bit Tag Requester Supported** – If this bit is Set, the Function supports 14-Bit Tag Requester capability; otherwise, the Function does not. This bit must not be Set if the 14-Bit Tag Completer Supported bit is Clear. If the Function is an RCiEP, this bit must be Clear if the RC does not support 14-Bit Tag Completer capability for Requests coming from this RCiEP. For VFs, this bit value must equal the VF 14-Bit Tag Requester Supported bit value in the SR-IOV Capabilities Register. See § Section 9.3.3.2.3 for additional details. Note that 14-Bit Tag field generation must be enabled by the 14-Bit Tag Requester Enable bit in the Device Control 3 register of the Requester Function before 14-Bit Tags can be generated by the Requester. See § Section 2.2.6.2 for additional details. | HwInit |
| 3 | **L0p Supported** – If Set, the Port supports L0p. This bit must be clear if Flit Mode Supported is Clear. All Functions associated with an Upstream Port must return the same value of this bit. | HwInit |
| 6:4 | **Port L0p Exit Latency** – indicates this Port's L0p Exit Latency. The value reported indicates the length of time this Port requires to complete widening a link using L0p. If L0p Supported is clear, this field must contain 000b. All Functions associated with an Upstream Port must return the same value of this field. Local L0p Exit Latency is computed as the maximum of Port L0p Exit Latency and Retimer L0p Exit Latency. Local L0p Exit Latency is transmitted in the L0p Exit Latency field of the Data Link Feature DLLP. The effective L0p Exit Latency of a Link is computed as the maximum of Local L0p Exit Latency and Remote L0p Exit Latency. Defined encodings are: <br>• `000b` Less than 1μs <br>• `001b` 1 μs to less than 2 μs <br>• `010b` 2 μs to less than 4 μs <br>• `011b` 4 μs to less than 8 μs <br>• `100b` 8 μs to less than 16 μs <br>• `101b` 16 μs to less than 32 μs <br>• `110b` 32 μs-64 μs <br>• `111b` More than 64 μs | HwInit |
| 9:7 | **Retimer L0p Exit Latency** – indicates this worst case L0p Exit Latency for retimers "associated" with this Port. The value reported indicates the length of time a Retimer requires to complete widening a link using L0p. If L0p Supported is clear, this field must contain 000b. All Functions associated with an Upstream Port must return the same value of this field. Local L0p Exit Latency is computed as the maximum of Port L0p Exit Latency and Retimer L0p Exit Latency. Local L0p Exit Latency is transmitted in the L0p Exit Latency field of the Data Link Feature DLLP. The effective L0p Exit Latency of a Link is computed as the maximum of Local L0p Exit Latency and Remote L0p Exit Latency. Defined encodings are: <br>• `000b` Less than 1μs | HwInit |

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

表 7-108 Device 能力 3 寄存器(续)

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | **14-Bit Tag Completer 支持(14-Bit Tag Completer Supported)** — 如果该位置位,则该功能支持 14-Bit Tag Completer 能力;否则不支持。更多详情请参见 § 第 2.2.6.2 节。该位 MUST@FLIT 必须置位。对于 VF,此位值必须与关联 PF 的位值相同。 | HwInit |
| 2 | **14-Bit Tag Requester 支持(14-Bit Tag Requester Supported)** — 如果该位置位,则该功能支持 14-Bit Tag Requester 能力;否则不支持。如果 14-Bit Tag Completer 支持位为清零状态,则该位不能置位。如果该功能是 RCiEP,且 RC 不支持来自此 RCiEP 请求的 14-Bit Tag Completer 能力,则该位必须清零。对于 VF,此位值必须等于 SR-IOV 能力寄存器 (SR-IOV Capabilities Register) 中的 VF 14-Bit Tag Requester 支持位值。更多详情请参见 § 第 9.3.3.2.3 节。注意:在 Requester 能够生成 14-Bit Tag 之前,必须通过 Requester 功能的 Device Control 3 寄存器中的 14-Bit Tag Requester 使能位启用 14-Bit Tag 字段生成。更多详情请参见 § 第 2.2.6.2 节。 | HwInit |
| 3 | **L0p 支持(L0p Supported)** — 如果置位,则该端口支持 L0p。如果 Flit 模式支持 (Flit Mode Supported) 为清零,则该位必须清零。与上游端口 (Upstream Port) 关联的所有功能必须返回该位的相同值。 | HwInit |
| 6:4 | **端口 L0p 退出延迟(Port L0p Exit Latency)** — 指示该端口的 L0p 退出延迟 (L0p Exit Latency)。所报告的值表示该端口使用 L0p 完成链路扩宽所需的时间长度。如果 L0p 支持位为清零,则此字段必须为 000b。与上游端口关联的所有功能必须返回此字段的相同值。本地 L0p 退出延迟 (Local L0p Exit Latency) 计算为端口 L0p 退出延迟和 Retimer L0p 退出延迟的最大值。本地 L0p 退出延迟通过数据链路特性 DLLP (Data Link Feature DLLP) 的 L0p Exit Latency 字段传输。链路的有效 L0p 退出延迟计算为本地 L0p 退出延迟和远端 L0p 退出延迟 (Remote L0p Exit Latency) 的最大值。已定义的编码为: <br>• `000b` 小于 1 μs <br>• `001b` 1 μs 至小于 2 μs <br>• `010b` 2 μs 至小于 4 μs <br>• `011b` 4 μs 至小于 8 μs <br>• `100b` 8 μs 至小于 16 μs <br>• `101b` 16 μs 至小于 32 μs <br>• `110b` 32 μs-64 μs <br>• `111b` 大于 64 μs | HwInit |
| 9:7 | **Retimer L0p 退出延迟(Retimer L0p Exit Latency)** — 指示与本端口"关联"的 Retimer 的最坏情况 L0p 退出延迟。所报告的值表示 Retimer 使用 L0p 完成链路扩宽所需的时间长度。如果 L0p 支持位为清零,则此字段必须为 000b。与上游端口关联的所有功能必须返回此字段的相同值。本地 L0p 退出延迟计算为端口 L0p 退出延迟和 Retimer L0p 退出延迟的最大值。本地 L0p 退出延迟通过数据链路特性 DLLP 的 L0p Exit Latency 字段传输。链路的有效 L0p 退出延迟计算为本地 L0p 退出延迟和远端 L0p 退出延迟的最大值。已定义的编码为: <br>• `000b` 小于 1 μs | HwInit |

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-7-7-9-3"></a>
## 7.7.9.3 Device Control 3 Register (Offset 08h) | Device 控制 3 寄存器 (偏移 08h)


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

7.7.9.3 Device Control 3 Register (Offset 08h) §

**IMPLEMENTATION NOTE:**

**USE OF UIO REQUEST 256B BOUNDARY DISABLE**

UIO is intended to be suitable for routing its Requests directly to memory controllers. For memory architectures that support interleaving, it is intended that a single UIO Request not target multiple memory controllers. When Clear, the UIO Request 256B Boundary Disable bit prevents UIO Requests from crossing naturally aligned 256-byte address boundaries, supporting interleaving granularities of that size and integer multiples of it.

Flit Mode Link efficiency for 256-byte UIO Requests is relatively high, and it increases only a few percent when maximum-sized 4-KB Requests are used. However, for cases where using larger UIO Requests is desired in order to increase Link efficiency and/or lower TLP rates, software may Set the UIO Request 256B Boundary Disable bit to enable larger Requests. Software should only do this if it knows there is no requirement for this Requester to honor 256-byte boundaries.

§

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

7.7.9.3 Device 控制 3 寄存器 (偏移 08h) §

**实现注意事项 (IMPLEMENTATION NOTE):**

**UIO 请求 256B 边界禁用的使用 (USE OF UIO REQUEST 256B BOUNDARY DISABLE)**

UIO 旨在适合将其请求直接路由到内存控制器。对于支持交叉 (interleaving) 的内存架构,意图是单个 UIO 请求不针对多个内存控制器。当清零时,UIO 请求 256B 边界禁用位 (UIO Request 256B Boundary Disable) 可防止 UIO 请求跨越自然对齐的 256 字节地址边界,从而支持该大小及其整数倍的交叉粒度。

256 字节 UIO 请求的 Flit 模式链路 (Flit Mode Link) 效率相对较高,使用最大 4-KB 请求时仅增加几个百分点。然而,在希望使用较大 UIO 请求以提高链路效率和/或降低 TLP 速率的情况下,软件可以置位 UIO 请求 256B 边界禁用位以启用较大的请求。软件只有在确认该 Requester 无需遵守 256 字节边界要求时,才应执行此操作。

§

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<tr>
<td>

Figure 7-123 Device Control 3 Register

| Bit | Name |
|---|---|
| 0 | DMWr Requester Enable |
| 1 | DMWr Egress Blocking |
| 2 | 14-Bit Tag Requester Enable |
| 3 | L0p Enable |
| 4-6 | Target Link Width |
| 7 | UIO Mem RdWr Requester Enable |
| 8 | UIO Request 256B Boundary Disable |
| 9-31 | RsvdP |

Table 7-109 Device Control 3 Register

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | **DMWr Requester Enable** - Applicable only to Endpoints, Root Ports and RCRBs; must be hardwired to 0b for other Function types. The Function is allowed to initiate DMWr Requests only if this bit and the Bus Master Enable bit in the Command register are both Set. This bit is required to be RW if the Endpoint or Root Port is capable of initiating DMWr Requests, but otherwise is permitted to be hardwired to 0b. This bit does not serve as a capability bit. This bit is permitted to be RW even if no DMWr Requester capabilities are supported by the Endpoint or Root Port. Default value of this bit is 0b. | RW |
| 1 | **DMWr Egress Blocking** – Applicable and mandatory for Switch Upstream Ports, Switch Downstream Ports, and Root Ports that implement DMWr routing; otherwise must be hardwired to 0b. When this bit is Set, DMWr Requests that target going out this Egress Port must be blocked. See § Section 6.32 . Default value of this bit is 0b. | RW/RO (see description) |
| 2 | **14-Bit Tag Requester Enable** – This bit, in combination with the Extended Tag Field Enable bit and 10-Bit Tag Requester Enable bit, determines how many Tag field bits a Requester is permitted to use. When the 14-Bit Tag Requester Enable bit is Set, the Requester is permitted to use 14-Bit Tags. See § Section 2.2.6.2 for complete details. If software changes the value of this bit while the Function has outstanding Non-Posted Requests, the result is undefined. For VFs, this bit is not supported and is RsvdP. The value in the VF 14-Bit Tag Requester Enable bit in the associated PF's SR-IOV Control Register applies to all its VFs. Non-VF Functions that do not implement 14-Bit Tag Requester capability are permitted to hardwire this bit to 0b. Default value of this bit is 0b. | RW/RO (see description), VF RsvdP |
| 3 | **L0p Enable** – Determines behavior of this Port when sending or responding to Link Management DLLPs of type L0p DLLP. This bit has no effect on Link Management DLLPs where the Link Mgmt Type field is other than L0p DLLP. This bit has no effect if Hardware Autonomous Width Disable is 1b. Default is 1b. | RW |

§

§

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

图 7-123 Device 控制 3 寄存器

| 位 | 名称 |
|---|---|
| 0 | DMWr Requester 使能 (DMWr Requester Enable) |
| 1 | DMWr Egress 阻塞 (DMWr Egress Blocking) |
| 2 | 14-Bit Tag Requester 使能 (14-Bit Tag Requester Enable) |
| 3 | L0p 使能 (L0p Enable) |
| 4-6 | 目标链路宽度 (Target Link Width) |
| 7 | UIO 内存读/写 Requester 使能 (UIO Mem RdWr Requester Enable) |

| 9-31 | RsvdP |

表 7-109 Device 控制 3 寄存器

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | **DMWr Requester 使能 (DMWr Requester Enable)** — 仅适用于端点 (Endpoint)、根端口 (Root Port) 和 RCRB;对于其他功能类型必须硬连线为 0b。仅当该位和命令寄存器 (Command register) 中的 Bus Master Enable 位均置位时,功能才被允许发起 DMWr 请求。如果端点或根端口能够发起 DMWr 请求,则该位必须为 RW,否则可允许硬连线为 0b。该位不作为能力位。即使端点或根端口不支持任何 DMWr Requester 能力,该位仍可允许为 RW。该位默认值为 0b。 | RW |
| 1 | **DMWr Egress 阻塞 (DMWr Egress Blocking)** — 对于实现 DMWr 路由的交换机上游端口 (Switch Upstream Port)、交换机下游端口 (Switch Downstream Port) 和根端口 (Root Port) 适用且强制;否则必须硬连线为 0b。当该位置位时,目标从此 Egress 端口出去的 DMWr 请求必须被阻塞。参见 § 第 6.32 节。该位默认值为 0b。 | RW/RO(见描述) |
| 2 | **14-Bit Tag Requester 使能 (14-Bit Tag Requester Enable)** — 该位与 Extended Tag Field Enable 位和 10-Bit Tag Requester Enable 位结合,确定 Requester 允许使用的 Tag 字段位数。当 14-Bit Tag Requester Enable 位置位时,Requester 允许使用 14-Bit Tag。完整详情请参见 § 第 2.2.6.2 节。如果软件在功能存在未完成的 Non-Posted 请求 (Non-Posted Request) 时更改此位的值,则结果未定义。对于 VF,不支持此位且为 RsvdP。关联 PF 的 SR-IOV 控制寄存器 (SR-IOV Control Register) 中的 VF 14-Bit Tag Requester Enable 位的值适用于其所有 VF。未实现 14-Bit Tag Requester 能力的非 VF 功能可允许将该位硬连线为 0b。该位默认值为 0b。 | RW/RO(见描述),VF RsvdP |
| 3 | **L0p 使能 (L0p Enable)** — 决定该端口在发送或响应类型为 L0p DLLP 的链路管理 DLLP (Link Management DLLP) 时的行为。对于 Link Mgmt Type 字段不是 L0p DLLP 的链路管理 DLLP,该位无效。如果 Hardware Autonomous Width Disable 为 1b,则该位无效。默认值为 1b。 | RW |

<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">

<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>

<tr>
<td>

Table 7-109 Device Control 3 Register (continued)

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|---|---|---|
| 6:4 | **Target Link Width** – writes to this field initiate a directed L0p Link Width change to the indicated width. Encodings are: <br>• `000b` x1 Link <br>• `001b` x2 Link <br>• `010b` x4 Link <br>• `011b` x8 Link <br>• `100b` x16 Link <br>• `111b` Dynamic – L0p Link Width is determined by the Ports with no architected software intervention <br>• Others Reserved <br><br>This field has no effect on subsequent autonomous Link Width changes. This field has no effect on subsequent Link Width changes due to link reliability. This field does not represent maximum Link Width support. This field is RsvdP if Flit Mode Supported is Clear. This field is permitted in RCRBs. This field has no effect if L0p Enable is Clear. This field has no effect if Hardware Autonomous Width Disable is 1b. Behavior is undefined if this field is set to a reserved encoding or to a width that is greater than the Link width on the most recent entry to L0. Default is 111b. | RW/RsvdP |
| 7 | **UIO Mem RdWr Requester Enable** – The Function is permitted to initiate UIO Memory Read and UIO Memory Write only if this bit and the Bus Master Enable bit in the Command Register are both Set. This bit is required to be RW if UIO Mem RdWr Requester Supported is Set, but otherwise is permitted to be hardwired to 0b. Default value of this bit is 0b. | RW/RO (see description) |
| 8 | **UIO Request 256B Boundary Disable** – When Clear, a UIO Request from this Function must not specify an Address/Length combination that causes a Memory Space access to cross a naturally aligned 256-byte boundary. When Set, a Request from this Function may cross a naturally aligned 256B boundary. The setting of this bit has no impact on the separate requirement that all Memory Requests must not specify an Address/Length combination that causes a Memory Space access to cross a naturally aligned 4-KB boundary (see § Section 2.2.7 ). Mechanisms outside the scope of this specification may enable more advanced boundary policies, such as using larger or smaller boundaries than 256B, or boundaries associated with specific address ranges. However, such policies must never violate the boundary requirements stated in this description. See the Implementation Note: Use of UIO Request 256B Boundary Disable. This bit is permitted to be hardwired to 0b if this Function's UIO Mem RdWr Requester Supported bit is Clear. Default value of this bit is 0b. | RW/RO (see description) |

§ Figure 7-124 details allocation of the register fields in the Device Status 3 Register; § Table 7-110 provides the respective bit definitions.

7.7.9.4 Device Status 3 Register (Offset 0Ch) §

表 7-109 Device 控制 3 寄存器(续)

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|---|---|---|
| 6:4 | **目标链路宽度 (Target Link Width)** — 对此字段的写入启动到所指示宽度的定向 L0p 链路宽度变更。编码为: <br>• `000b` x1 链路 <br>• `001b` x2 链路 <br>• `010b` x4 链路 <br>• `011b` x8 链路 <br>• `100b` x16 链路 <br>• `111b` 动态 (Dynamic) — L0p 链路宽度由端口决定,无需架构化软件干预 <br>• 其他 保留 (Reserved) <br><br>此字段对后续自主链路宽度变更无效。此字段对因链路可靠性引起的后续链路宽度变更无效。此字段不表示最大链路宽度支持。如果 Flit 模式支持 (Flit Mode Supported) 为清零,则此字段为 RsvdP。允许在 RCRB 中使用此字段。如果 L0p Enable 为清零,则此字段无效。如果 Hardware Autonomous Width Disable 为 1b,则此字段无效。如果此字段设置为保留编码或宽度大于最近一次进入 L0 时链路宽度的值,则行为未定义。默认值为 111b。 | RW/RsvdP |
| 7 | **UIO 内存读/写 Requester 使能 (UIO Mem RdWr Requester Enable)** — 仅当该位和命令寄存器 (Command Register) 中的 Bus Master Enable 位均置位时,功能才被允许发起 UIO 内存读和 UIO 内存写。如果 UIO Mem RdWr Requester Supported 位置位,则该位必须为 RW,否则可允许硬连线为 0b。该位默认值为 0b。 | RW/RO(见描述) |
| 8 | **UIO 请求 256B 边界禁用 (UIO Request 256B Boundary Disable)** — 当清零时,来自该功能的 UIO 请求不得指定导致内存空间 (Memory Space) 访问跨越自然对齐的 256 字节边界的地址/长度组合。当置位时,来自该功能的请求可以跨越自然对齐的 256B 边界。该位的设置对以下单独要求没有影响:所有内存请求不得指定导致内存空间访问跨越自然对齐的 4-KB 边界的地址/长度组合(参见 § 第 2.2.7 节)。本规范范围之外的机制可启用更高级的边界策略,例如使用大于或小于 256B 的边界,或与特定地址范围关联的边界。但是,此类策略绝不能违反本描述中所述的边界要求。请参见实现注意事项:使用 UIO 请求 256B 边界禁用。如果此功能的 UIO Mem RdWr Requester Supported 位为清零,则允许将该位硬连线为 0b。该位默认值为 0b。 | RW/RO(见描述) |

§ 图 7-124 详述了 Device 状态 3 寄存器 (Device Status 3 Register) 中寄存器字段的分配;§ 表 7-110 提供了相应的位定义。

<a id="sec-7-7-9-4"></a>
## 7.7.9.4 Device Status 3 Register (Offset 0Ch) | Device 状态 3 寄存器 (偏移 0Ch)

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Figure 7-124 Device Status 3 Register

| Bit | Name |
|---|---|
| 0-2 | Initial Link Width |
| 3 | Segment Captured |
| 4 | Remote L0p Supported |
| 5-31 | RsvdZ |

Table 7-110 Device Status 3 Register

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|---|---|---|
| 2:0 | **Initial Link Width** – This field contains the Link Width determined during initial link training. Encodings are: <br>• `000b` x1 Link <br>• `001b` x2 Link <br>• `010b` x4 Link <br>• `011b` x8 Link <br>• `100b` x16 Link <br>• Others Reserved <br><br>Default is determined during initial link training. Note that the current Link Width is visible in the Negotiated Link Width field. | RO |
| 3 | **Segment Captured** – This bit indicates if the Function has captured a valid Segment value from a Configuration Write Request as described in § Section 2.2.6.2 . When the Destination Segment field is captured from a Configuration Write Request in FM this bit must be set to the value of the DSV bit received with the Request. This bit must be cleared when a Configuration Write Request is received in NFM. Note that this bit will be set when every Link on the path from the Function to the RC is in FM. This bit will be clear if any Link between the Function and the RC is in NFM. Functions should only initiate Route by ID Message Requests targeting Hierarchies other than their own when this bit is Set. This bit is permitted to be hardwired to 0b in devices that don't support FM. FM Requesters and Completers within an RC capture their Segment value in an implementation specific way and must then Set this bit. The value in a Switch Downstream Port must be identical to the value in the associated Switch Upstream Port. Default is Zero in Functions that capture their Segment value. | RO |
| 4 | **Remote L0p Supported** – This bit indicates that the remote end of the Link supports L0p. Default is zero. | RO |

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

图 7-124 Device 状态 3 寄存器

| 位 | 名称 |
|---|---|
| 0-2 | 初始链路宽度 (Initial Link Width) |
| 3 | 已捕获段 (Segment Captured) |
| 4 | 远端 L0p 支持 (Remote L0p Supported) |
| 5-31 | RsvdZ |

表 7-110 Device 状态 3 寄存器

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|---|---|---|
| 2:0 | **初始链路宽度 (Initial Link Width)** — 此字段包含初始链路训练期间确定的链路宽度。编码为: <br>• `000b` x1 链路 <br>• `001b` x2 链路 <br>• `010b` x4 链路 <br>• `011b` x8 链路 <br>• `100b` x16 链路 <br>• 其他 保留 (Reserved) <br><br>默认值由初始链路训练确定。注意,当前链路宽度可在协商链路宽度 (Negotiated Link Width) 字段中查看。 | RO |
| 3 | **已捕获段 (Segment Captured)** — 该位指示该功能是否已从配置写请求 (Configuration Write Request) 中捕获有效的段值,如 § 第 2.2.6.2 节所述。在 FM 中从配置写请求捕获目标段 (Destination Segment) 字段时,该位必须设置为随该请求接收的 DSV 位的值。在 NFM 中接收到配置写请求时,该位必须清零。注意,当从该功能到 RC 的路径上的每条链路都处于 FM 时,该位将置位。如果该功能与 RC 之间的任何链路处于 NFM,则该位将清零。仅当该位置位时,功能才应启动针对非自身层级 (Hierarchy) 的按 ID 路由消息请求 (Route by ID Message Request)。在不支持 FM 的设备中,允许将该位硬连线为 0b。RC 内的 FM Requester 和 Completer 以特定于实现的方式捕获其段值,然后必须置位该位。交换机下游端口 (Switch Downstream Port) 中的值必须与关联的交换机上游端口 (Switch Upstream Port) 中的值相同。在捕获其段值的功能中,默认值为零。 | RO |
| 4 | **远端 L0p 支持 (Remote L0p Supported)** — 该位指示链路的远端支持 L0p。默认值为零。 | RO |

7.7.10 接收器通道裕度扩展能力 §

§

§

<!-- 📄 Page 1156 -->

<a id="sec-7-7-10-cont"></a>
### Lane Margining at the Receiver Extended Capability (cont.) | 接收器通道裕度扩展能力(续)


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

- A Function associated with a Downstream Port where the Supported Link Speeds Vector field indicates support for a Link speed of 16.0 GT/s or higher.
- A Function of a single-Function Device associated with an Upstream Port where the Supported Link Speeds Vector field indicates support for a Link speed of 16.0 GT/s or higher.
- Function 0 (and only Function 0) of a Multi-Function Device associated with an Upstream Port where the Supported Link Speeds Vector field indicates support for a Link speed of 16.0 GT/s or higher.

§ Figure 7-125 shows the layout of the Margining Extended Capability. This capability contains a pair of per-Port registers followed by a set of per-Lane registers.

The number of per-Lane entries is determined by the Maximum Link Width (see § Section 7.5.3.6 or § Section 7.9.9.2 ). Up to 32 entries are permitted regardless of the Maximum Link Width. The value of entries beyond the Maximum Link Width is undefined.

Each per-Lane entry contains the values for that Lane. Lane numbering uses the default Lane number and is thus invariant to Link width and Lane reversal negotiation that occurs during Link training.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

- 与下游端口 (Downstream Port) 关联的功能,其中支持的链路速度向量 (Supported Link Speeds Vector) 字段指示支持 16.0 GT/s 或更高的链路速度。
- 与上游端口 (Upstream Port) 关联的单功能设备 (single-Function Device) 的功能,其中支持的链路速度向量字段指示支持 16.0 GT/s 或更高的链路速度。
- 与上游端口关联的多功能设备 (Multi-Function Device) 的 Function 0(且仅为 Function 0),其中支持的链路速度向量字段指示支持 16.0 GT/s 或更高的链路速度。

§ 图 7-125 显示了裕度扩展能力 (Margining Extended Capability) 的布局。该能力包含一对每端口 (per-Port) 寄存器,后跟一组每通道 (per-Lane) 寄存器。

每通道条目的数量由最大链路宽度 (Maximum Link Width) 决定(参见 § 第 7.5.3.6 节或 § 第 7.9.9.2 节)。无论最大链路宽度如何,最多允许 32 个条目。超出最大链路宽度的条目值未定义。

每个每通道条目包含该通道 (Lane) 的值。通道编号使用默认的通道号,因此不受链路训练期间发生的链路宽度和通道反转 (Lane reversal) 协商的影响。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

| +00Ch | Margining Lane Control: Lane 0 |
| +010h | Margining Lane Status: Lane 0 |
| +014h | Margining Lane Control: Lane 1 (Optional) |
| +018h | Margining Lane Status: Lane 1 (Optional) |
| +01Ch | Margining Lane Control: Lane 2 (Optional) |
| +020h | Margining Lane Status: Lane 2 (Optional) |
| +024h | Margining Lane Control: Lane 3 (Optional) |
| +028h | Margining Lane Status: Lane 3 (Optional) |
| +02Ch | Margining Lane Control: Lane 4 (Optional) |

<a id="sec-7-7-10-1"></a>
## 7.7.10.1 Lane Margining at the Receiver Extended Capability Header (Offset 00h) | 接收器通道裕度扩展能力头 (偏移 00h)


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Figure 7-126 Lane Margining at the Receiver Extended Capability Header

| Bits 0-15 | Bits 16-19 | Bits 20-31 |
|---|---|---|
| PCI Express Extended Capability ID = 0027h | Capability Version | Next Capability Offset |

Table 7-111 Lane Margining at the Receiver Extended Capability Header

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|---|---|---|
| 15:0 | **PCI Express Extended Capability ID** - This field is a PCI-SIG defined ID number that indicates the nature and format of the Extended Capability. The Extended Capability ID for the Lane Margining at the Receiver Extended Capability is 0027h. | RO |
| 19:16 | **Capability Version** - This field is a PCI-SIG defined version number that indicates the version of the Capability structure present. Must be 1h for this version of the specification. | RO |
| 31:20 | **Next Capability Offset** - This field contains the offset to the next PCI Express Capability structure or 000h if no other items exist in the linked list of Capabilities. For Extended Capabilities implemented in Configuration Space, this offset is relative to the beginning of PCI-compatible Configuration Space and thus must always be either 000h (for terminating list of Capabilities) or greater than 0FFh. | RO |

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

图 7-126 接收器通道裕度扩展能力头

| 位 0-15 | 位 16-19 | 位 20-31 |
|---|---|---|
| PCI Express 扩展能力 ID = 0027h | Capability Version (能力版本) | Next Capability Offset (下一能力偏移) |

表 7-111 接收器通道裕度扩展能力头

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|---|---|---|
| 15:0 | **PCI Express 扩展能力 ID** — 该字段是 PCI-SIG 定义的 ID 号,指示扩展能力的性质和格式。接收器通道裕度扩展能力的扩展能力 ID 为 0027h。 | RO |
| 19:16 | **Capability Version(能力版本)** — 该字段是 PCI-SIG 定义的版本号,指示所存在的能力结构的版本。对于本版本的规范,必须为 1h。 | RO |
| 31:20 | **Next Capability Offset(下一能力偏移)** — 该字段包含到下一个 PCI Express 能力结构的偏移,若能力链表无其他项则为 000h。对于在配置空间 (Configuration Space) 中实现的扩展能力,该偏移相对于 PCI 兼容配置空间 (PCI-compatible Configuration Space) 的起点,因此必须始终为 000h(用于终止能力列表)或大于 0FFh。 | RO |

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

<a id="sec-7-7-10-2-cont"></a>
### Margining Port Capabilities Register (cont.) | 裕度端口能力寄存器(续)


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

Table 7-112 Margining Port Capabilities Register (continued)

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|---|---|---|
| 0 (cont.) | **Margining uses Driver Software** (continued): does not require device driver software. In this case the value read from Margining Software Ready is undefined. | HwInit |

Figure 7-128 Margining Port Status Register

| Bit | Name |
|---|---|
| 0 | Margining Ready |
| 1 | Margining Software Ready |
| 2-15 | RsvdZ |

Table 7-113 Margining Port Status Register

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | **Margining Ready** - Indicates when the Margining feature is ready to accept margining commands. Behavior is undefined if this bit is Clear and, for any Lane, any of the Receiver Number, Margin Type, Usage Model, or Margin Payload fields are written (see § Section 7.7.10.4 ). If Margining uses Driver Software is Set, Margining Ready must be Set no later than 100 ms after the later of Margining Software Ready becoming Set or the link training to 16.0 GT/s or higher. If Margining uses Driver Software is Clear, Margining Ready must be Set no later than 100 ms after the Link trains to 16.0 GT/s or higher. Default value is implementation specific. | RO |
| 1 | **Margining Software Ready** - When Margining uses Driver Software is Set, then this bit, when Set, indicates that the required software has performed the required initialization. The value of this bit is undefined if Margining uses Driver Software is Clear. The default value of this bit is implementation specific. | RO |

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

表 7-112 裕度端口能力寄存器(续)

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|---|---|---|
| 0(续) | **裕度使用驱动软件(续):** 不需要设备驱动软件。在这种情况下,从裕度软件就绪 (Margining Software Ready) 读取的值未定义。 | HwInit |

图 7-128 裕度端口状态寄存器

| 位 | 名称 |
|---|---|
| 0 | 裕度就绪 (Margining Ready) |
| 1 | 裕度软件就绪 (Margining Software Ready) |
| 2-15 | RsvdZ |

表 7-113 裕度端口状态寄存器

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|---|---|---|
| 0 | **裕度就绪 (Margining Ready)** — 指示裕度功能何时就绪以接受裕度命令。如果该位为清零且对任何通道写入了接收器编号 (Receiver Number)、裕度类型 (Margin Type)、使用模式 (Usage Model) 或裕度负载 (Margin Payload) 字段中的任意字段(参见 § 第 7.7.10.4 节),则行为未定义。如果裕度使用驱动软件位置位,则裕度就绪必须在裕度软件就绪置位或链路训练到 16.0 GT/s 或更高速度(取较晚者)之后 100 ms 内置位。如果裕度使用驱动软件位为清零,则裕度就绪必须在链路训练到 16.0 GT/s 或更高速度之后 100 ms 内置位。默认值特定于实现。 | RO |
| 1 | **裕度软件就绪 (Margining Software Ready)** — 当裕度使用驱动软件位置位时,该位置位时指示所需软件已执行所需的初始化。如果裕度使用驱动软件位为清零,则此位的值未定义。此位的默认值特定于实现。 | RO |

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

<a id="sec-7-7-10-3"></a>
## 7.7.10.3 Margining Port Status Register (Offset 06h) | 裕度端口状态寄存器 (偏移 06h)

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

7.7.10.3 Margining Port Status Register (Offset 06h) §

The Margining Lane Control Register consists of control fields required for per-Lane margining.

The number of entries in this register are sized by Maximum Link Width (see § Section 7.5.3.6 ).

See § Section 4.2.8.2 for details of this register.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

7.7.10.3 裕度端口状态寄存器 (偏移 06h) §

裕度通道控制寄存器 (Margining Lane Control Register) 由每通道裕度 (per-Lane margining) 所需的控制字段组成。

该寄存器中的条目数量由最大链路宽度 (Maximum Link Width) 决定(参见 § 第 7.5.3.6 节)。

有关该寄存器的详细信息,请参见 § 第 4.2.8.2 节。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

[⬆️ 返回目录](#-本章目录-table-of-contents)

---

<a id="sec-7-7-10-4"></a>
## 7.7.10.4 Margining Lane Control Register (Offset 08h) | Margining Lane 控制寄存器（偏移 08h）


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

> **Figure 7-129.** Lane N: Margining Control Register Entry

> <img src="figures/chapter_07/fig_1160_1_tight.png" width="700">

>
> Bit fields:
> - Bits [2:0] Receiver Number
> - Bits [5:3] Margin Type
> - Bit [6] Usage Model
> - Bit [7] RsvdP
> - Bits [15:8] Margin Payload

**Table 7-114. Lane N: Margining Control Register Entry**

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|--------------|----------------------|------------|
| 2:0 | Receiver Number - See § Section 4.2.18.1 for details. The default value is 000b. This field must be reset to the default value if the Port goes to DL_Down status. | RW (see description) |
| 5:3 | Margin Type - See § Section 4.2.18.1 for details. The default value is 111b. This field must be reset to the default value if the Port goes to DL_Down status. | RW (see description) |
| 6 | Usage Model - See § Section 4.2.18.1 for details. The default value is 0b. This field must be reset to the default value if the Port goes to DL_Down status. | RW (see description) |
| 15:8 | Margin Payload - See § Section 4.2.18.1 for details. This field's value is used in conjunction with the Margin Type field, as described in § Section 4.2.18.1. The default value is 9Ch. This field must be reset to the default value if the Port goes to DL_Down status. | RW (see description) |

The Margining Lane Status register consists of status fields required for per-Lane margining. The number of entries in this register are sized by Maximum Link Width (see § Section 7.5.3.6). See § Section 4.2.8.2 for details of this register.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

> **图 7-129.** 通道 N：Margining 控制寄存器条目
>
> 位字段：
> - 位 [2:0] 接收器编号（Receiver Number）
> - 位 [5:3] Margin 类型（Margin Type）
> - 位 [6] 使用模式（Usage Model）
> - 位 [7] RsvdP
> - 位 [15:8] Margin 负载（Margin Payload）

**表 7-114. 通道 N：Margining 控制寄存器条目**

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|--------|------------|------|
| 2:0 | 接收器编号（Receiver Number）- 详见 § 第 4.2.18.1 节。默认值为 000b。如果端口进入 DL_Down 状态，此字段必须复位为默认值。 | RW（见描述） |
| 5:3 | Margin 类型（Margin Type）- 详见 § 第 4.2.18.1 节。默认值为 111b。如果端口进入 DL_Down 状态，此字段必须复位为默认值。 | RW（见描述） |
| 6 | 使用模式（Usage Model）- 详见 § 第 4.2.18.1 节。默认值为 0b。如果端口进入 DL_Down 状态，此字段必须复位为默认值。 | RW（见描述） |
| 15:8 | Margin 负载（Margin Payload）- 详见 § 第 4.2.18.1 节。此字段值与 Margin Type 字段配合使用，描述见 § 第 4.2.18.1 节。默认值为 9Ch。如果端口进入 DL_Down 状态，此字段必须复位为默认值。 | RW（见描述） |

Margining Lane Status 寄存器由 per-Lane margining 所需的状态字段组成。该寄存器中的条目数由 Maximum Link Width 决定（见 § 第 7.5.3.6 节）。有关该寄存器的详细信息，请参阅 § 第 4.2.8.2 节。

<img src="figures/chapter_07/fig_1160_1_tight.png" width="700">
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|--------|------------|------|
| 2:0 | 接收器编号状态（Receiver Number Status）- 详见 § 第 4.2.18.1 节。默认值为 000b。对于下游端口，如果端口进入 DL_Down 状态，此字段必须复位为默认值。 | RO（见描述） |

| 6 | 使用模式状态（Usage Model Status）- 详见 § 第 4.2.18.1 节。默认值为 0b。如果端口进入 DL_Down 状态，此字段必须复位为默认值。 | RO（见描述） |
| 15:8 | Margin 负载状态（Margin Payload Status）- 详见 § 第 4.2.18.1 节。仅当 Margin Type 为除"No Command"之外的已定义编码时，此字段才有意义。默认值为 00h。如果端口进入 DL_Down 状态，此字段必须复位为默认值。 | RO（见描述） |

<a id="sec-7-7-11"></a>
## 7.7.11 ACS Extended Capability | ACS 扩展能力（Access Control Services）


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

The ACS Extended Capability is an optional capability that provides enhanced access controls (see § Section 6.12). This capability may be implemented by a Root Port, a Switch Downstream Port, or a Multi-Function Device Function. It is never applicable to a PCI Express to PCI Bridge or Root Complex Event Collector. It is not applicable to a Switch Upstream Port unless that Switch Upstream Port is a Function in a Multi-Function Device.

If an SR-IOV Capable Device other than one in a Root Complex implements internal peer-to-peer transactions, ACS is required, and ACS P2P Egress Control must be supported.

Implementation of ACS in RCiEPs is permitted but not required. It is explicitly permitted that within a single Root Complex, some RCiEPs implement ACS and some do not. It is strongly recommended that Root Complex implementations ensure that all accesses originating from RCiEPs (PFs and VFs) without ACS capability are first subjected to processing by a Translation Agent (TA) in the Root Complex before further decoding and processing. The details are outside the scope of this specification.

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

ACS（访问控制服务，Access Control Services）扩展能力是一个可选能力，提供增强的访问控制（见 § 第 6.12 节）。此能力可由根端口（Root Port）、交换机下游端口（Switch Downstream Port）或多功能设备的某个功能（Multi-Function Device Function）实现。PCI Express 到 PCI 桥接器或根复合体事件收集器（Root Complex Event Collector）永远不适用 ACS。除非该交换机上游端口（Switch Upstream Port）是多功能设备中的一个功能，否则 ACS 也不适用于交换机上游端口。

如果根复合体之外的 SR-IOV（单根 I/O 虚拟化，Single Root I/O Virtualization）兼容设备实现了内部对等（peer-to-peer）事务，则必须实现 ACS，并且必须支持 ACS P2P Egress Control。

RCiEP 中实现 ACS 是允许的，但不是必需的。明确允许在单个根复合体（Root Complex）内部，某些 RCiEP 实现 ACS 而某些不实现。强烈建议根复合体实现确保所有来自不具备 ACS 能力的 RCiEP（PF 和 VF）的访问，在进一步解码和处理之前首先由根复合体中的转换代理（Translation Agent, TA）处理。其细节不在本规范范围内。

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


---

<a id="sec-7-7-11-1"></a>
## 7.7.11.1 ACS Extended Capability Header (Offset 00h) | ACS 扩展能力头（偏移 00h）

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

<!-- 📄 Page 1162 -->
---

> **Figure 7-131.** ACS Extended Capability

> <img src="figures/chapter_07/fig_1162_1_tight.png" width="700">

>
> Register layout (Byte Offset / Register):
> - +000h: PCI Express Extended Capability Header
> - +004h: ACS Capability Register
> - +006h: ACS Control Register
> - +008h: Egress Control Vector (if required)
> - +00Ch and beyond: (additional Egress Control Vector DWORDs if required)

> **Figure 7-132.** ACS Extended Capability Header

> <img src="figures/chapter_07/fig_1162_2_tight.png" width="700">

>
> Bit fields:
> - Bits [15:0] PCI Express Extended Capability ID = 000Dh
> - Bits [19:16] Capability Version
> - Bits [31:20] Next Capability Offset

**Table 7-116. ACS Extended Capability Header**

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|--------------|----------------------|------------|
| 15:0 | PCI Express Extended Capability ID - This field is a PCI-SIG defined ID number that indicates the nature and format of the Extended Capability. PCI Express Extended Capability ID for the ACS Extended Capability is 000Dh. | RO |
| 19:16 | Capability Version - This field is a PCI-SIG defined version number that indicates the version of the Capability structure present. Must be 1h for this version of the specification. | RO |
| 31:20 | Next Capability Offset - This field contains the offset to the next PCI Express Extended Capability structure or 000h if no other items exist in the linked list of Capabilities. | RO |

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

<!-- 📄 Page 1162 -->
---

> **图 7-131.** ACS 扩展能力
>
> 寄存器布局（字节偏移 / 寄存器）：
> - +000h：PCI Express 扩展能力头（PCI Express Extended Capability Header）
> - +004h：ACS 能力寄存器（ACS Capability Register）
> - +006h：ACS 控制寄存器（ACS Control Register）
> - +008h：Egress Control Vector（如需要）
> - +00Ch 及之后：（额外的 Egress Control Vector DWORD，如需要）

> **图 7-132.** ACS 扩展能力头
>
> 位字段：
> - 位 [15:0] PCI Express 扩展能力 ID = 000Dh
> - 位 [19:16] 能力版本（Capability Version）
> - 位 [31:20] 下一能力偏移（Next Capability Offset）

**表 7-116. ACS 扩展能力头**

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|--------|------------|------|
| 15:0 | PCI Express 扩展能力 ID - 此字段是由 PCI-SIG 定义的 ID 号，用于指示扩展能力的性质和格式。ACS 扩展能力的 PCI Express 扩展能力 ID 为 000Dh。 | RO |
| 19:16 | 能力版本（Capability Version）- 此字段是由 PCI-SIG 定义的版本号，用于指示当前存在的能力结构版本。对于本版本的规范，必须为 1h。 | RO |
| 31:20 | 下一能力偏移（Next Capability Offset）- 此字段包含下一个 PCI Express 扩展能力结构的偏移量，若能力链表不存在其他条目则为 000h。 | RO |

<img src="figures/chapter_07/fig_1162_1_tight.png" width="700">
</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a id="sec-7-7-11-2"></a>
## 7.7.11.2 ACS Capability Register (Offset 04h) | ACS 能力寄存器（偏移 04h）


<div style="overflow-x: auto; max-width: 100%;">
<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

<!-- 📄 Page 1163 -->
---

> **Figure 7-133.** ACS Capability Register
>
> Bit fields:
> - Bit [0] ACS Source Validation
> - Bit [1] ACS Translation Blocking
> - Bit [2] ACS P2P Request Redirect
> - Bit [3] ACS P2P Completion Redirect
> - Bit [4] ACS Upstream Forwarding
> - Bit [5] ACS P2P Egress Control
> - Bit [6] ACS Direct Translated P2P
> - Bit [7] ACS Enhanced Capability
> - Bits [15:8] Egress Control Vector Size

**Table 7-117. ACS Capability Register**

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|--------------|----------------------|------------|
| 0 | ACS Source Validation - Required for Root Ports and Switch Downstream Ports; must be hardwired to 0b otherwise. If 1b, indicates that the component implements ACS Source Validation. | RO |
| 1 | ACS Translation Blocking - Required for Root Ports and Switch Downstream Ports; must be hardwired to 0b otherwise. If 1b, indicates that the component implements ACS Translation Blocking. | RO |
| 2 | ACS P2P Request Redirect - Required for Root Ports that support peer-to-peer traffic with other Root Ports; required for Switch Downstream Ports; required for Multi-Function Device Functions that support peer-to-peer traffic with other Functions; must be hardwired to 0b otherwise. If 1b, indicates that the component implements ACS P2P Request Redirect. | RO |
| 3 | ACS P2P Completion Redirect - Required for all Functions that support ACS P2P Request Redirect; must be hardwired to 0b otherwise. If 1b, indicates that the component implements ACS P2P Completion Redirect. | RO |
| 4 | ACS Upstream Forwarding - Required for Root Ports if the RC supports Redirected Request Validation; required for Switch Downstream Ports; must be hardwired to 0b otherwise. If 1b, indicates that the component implements ACS Upstream Forwarding. | RO |
| 5 | ACS P2P Egress Control - Except as stated below, optional for Root Ports, Switch Downstream Ports, and Multi-Function Device Functions; otherwise this bit must be hardwired to Zero. If Set, indicates that the component implements ACS P2P Egress Control. For an SR-IOV Device not in a Root Complex, this bit is required to be Set for Functions if peer-to-peer transactions within the Device are supported. | RO |
| 6 | ACS Direct Translated P2P - Required for Root Ports that support Address Translation Services (ATS) and also support peer-to-peer traffic with other Root Ports; required for Switch Downstream Ports; required for Multi-Function Device Functions that support Address Translation Services (ATS) and also support peer-to-peer traffic with other Functions; must be hardwired to 0b otherwise. If 1b, indicates that the component implements ACS Direct Translated P2P. | RO |

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

<!-- 📄 Page 1163 -->
---

> **图 7-133.** ACS 能力寄存器
>
> 位字段：
> - 位 [0] ACS 源验证（ACS Source Validation）
> - 位 [1] ACS 转换阻塞（ACS Translation Blocking）
> - 位 [2] ACS P2P 请求重定向（ACS P2P Request Redirect）
> - 位 [3] ACS P2P 完成重定向（ACS P2P Completion Redirect）
> - 位 [4] ACS 上行转发（ACS Upstream Forwarding）
> - 位 [5] ACS P2P Egress Control
> - 位 [6] ACS 直传 P2P（ACS Direct Translated P2P）
> - 位 [7] ACS 增强能力（ACS Enhanced Capability）
> - 位 [15:8] Egress Control Vector 大小（Egress Control Vector Size）

**表 7-117. ACS 能力寄存器**

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|--------|------------|------|
| 0 | ACS 源验证（ACS Source Validation）- 根端口和交换机下游端口必须实现；否则必须硬连线为 0b。若为 1b，表示该组件实现了 ACS Source Validation。 | RO |
| 1 | ACS 转换阻塞（ACS Translation Blocking）- 根端口和交换机下游端口必须实现；否则必须硬连线为 0b。若为 1b，表示该组件实现了 ACS Translation Blocking。 | RO |
| 2 | ACS P2P 请求重定向（ACS P2P Request Redirect）- 支持与其他根端口对等通信的根端口必须实现；交换机下游端口必须实现；支持与其他功能对等通信的多功能设备功能必须实现；否则必须硬连线为 0b。若为 1b，表示该组件实现了 ACS P2P Request Redirect。 | RO |
| 3 | ACS P2P 完成重定向（ACS P2P Completion Redirect）- 所有支持 ACS P2P Request Redirect 的功能必须实现；否则必须硬连线为 0b。若为 1b，表示该组件实现了 ACS P2P Completion Redirect。 | RO |
| 4 | ACS 上行转发（ACS Upstream Forwarding）- 若 RC 支持 Redirected Request Validation，则根端口必须实现；交换机下游端口必须实现；否则必须硬连线为 0b。若为 1b，表示该组件实现了 ACS Upstream Forwarding。 | RO |
| 5 | ACS P2P Egress Control - 除下文所述外，对于根端口、交换机下游端口和多功能设备功能为可选项；否则此位必须硬连线为 0。若置位，表示该组件实现了 ACS P2P Egress Control。对于不在根复合体中的 SR-IOV 设备，如果支持设备内部的对等事务，则其功能的该位必须置位。 | RO |
| 6 | ACS 直传 P2P（ACS Direct Translated P2P）- 支持地址转换服务（Address Translation Services, ATS）且支持与其他根端口对等通信的根端口必须实现；交换机下游端口必须实现；支持 ATS 且支持与其他功能对等通信的多功能设备功能必须实现；否则必须硬连线为 0b。若为 1b，表示该组件实现了 ACS Direct Translated P2P。 | RO |

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>


<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th width="50%">🇬🇧 English</th>
<th width="50%" style="background-color:#e8e8e8">🏆 中文</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>

<!-- 📄 Page 1164 -->
---

**Table 7-117. ACS Capability Register (continued)**

| Bit Location | Register Description | Attributes |
|--------------|----------------------|------------|
| 7 | ACS Enhanced Capability - Required for Root Ports and Switch Downstream Ports that support the ACS Enhanced Capability mechanisms. If Set, indicates that the component supports all of the following mechanisms that are applicable: <ul><li>ACS I/O Request Blocking</li><li>ACS DSP Memory Target Access</li><li>ACS USP Memory Target Access</li><li>ACS Unclaimed Request Redirect</li></ul> | RO |
| 15:8 | Egress Control Vector Size - Encodings 01h-FFh directly indicate the number of applicable bits in the Egress Control Vector; the encoding 00h indicates 256 bits. If the ACS P2P Egress Control bit is 0b, the value of the size field is undefined, and the Egress Control Vector Register is not required to be present. | HwInit |

</td>
<td style="background-color:#e8e8e8">

<!-- 📄 Page 1164 -->
---

**表 7-117. ACS 能力寄存器（续）**

| 位位置 | 寄存器描述 | 属性 |
|--------|------------|------|
| 7 | ACS 增强能力（ACS Enhanced Capability）- 支持 ACS Enhanced Capability 机制的根端口和交换机下游端口必须实现。若置位，表示该组件支持以下所有适用的机制：<ul><li>ACS I/O 请求阻塞（ACS I/O Request Blocking）</li><li>ACS DSP 内存目标访问（ACS DSP Memory Target Access）</li><li>ACS USP 内存目标访问（ACS USP Memory Target Access）</li><li>ACS 未声明请求重定向（ACS Unclaimed Request Redirect）</li></ul> | RO |
| 15:8 | Egress Control Vector 大小（Egress Control Vector Size）- 编码 01h–FFh 直接表示 Egress Control Vector 中适用的位数；编码 00h 表示 256 位。如果 ACS P2P Egress Control 位为 0b，则大小字段的值未定义，且 Egress Control Vector 寄存器不需要存在。 | HwInit |

</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
